name: descript
title: Descript
description: Import media, browse projects, monitor jobs, and run Underlord prompts in Descript without leaving Raycast.
author: luarmr

commands.name: browse-projects
commands.title: Browse Projects
commands.description: Search Descript projects with an inline detail pane and drill into their compositions and media files.

commands.name: recent-jobs
commands.title: Recent Jobs
commands.description: See the status of recent imports, Underlord edits, and publish jobs.

commands.name: import-selected-media
commands.title: Import Selected Media
commands.description: Send Finder-selected files to a new or existing Descript project.

commands.name: run-underlord-prompt
commands.title: Run Underlord Prompt
commands.description: Run an Underlord one-shot prompt against an existing project.

commands.name: descript-activity
commands.title: Descript Activity
commands.subtitle: Descript
commands.description: Menu bar status for background uploads, in-progress jobs, and recently finished Descript activity.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
